name: Remote Service Session Hijacking
description: Detects hijacking of existing remote sessions using tscon or similar
query:
// Detect RDP session hijacking via tscon
// Trigger on tscon.exe being used to switch sessions
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(tscon\s+[0-9]+\s+/dest|query\s+session|qwinsta)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 1
within 120 seconds
